scripts.dev:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$workspace=(Get-Location).Path; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*next*dev*' -and $_.CommandLine -like ('*' + $workspace + '*') } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Remove-Item '.next\dev\lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run dev"
